profit_pools.name: qualified HBM supply
profit_pools.rationale: Qualified HBM capacity is directly attached to accelerator shipments and can capture mix and ASP upside when supply is constrained.

profit_pools.name: advanced packaging capacity
profit_pools.rationale: HBM value cannot be realized without package-level integration, interposers, substrates, and yield control.

segments.name: HBM suppliers
segments.role: Manufacture and qualify stacked high-bandwidth memory for AI accelerators.

segments.name: Advanced packaging
segments.role: Integrate accelerators and HBM through 2.5D/3D package technology.

segments.name: HBM test and bonding equipment
segments.role: Enable yield learning, stack validation, and high-volume qualification.

segments.name: Accelerator vendors
segments.role: Consume qualified HBM capacity in GPU and custom ASIC packages.
